recommended_paths: Treat the missing fail-first provenance as explicit low historical debt and avoid opening another round for it alone.
exact_next_step: Record reviewer resolutions in the governing TODO using the machine-checkable resolution table or equivalent gate ledger, then extract the derived resolution packet and decide whether another bounded review pass is still required.

findings.title: Historical fail-first evidence is unavailable
findings.rationale: The RR-AUTH-04 slice was normalized after code/test hardening had already started, so preserved fail-first or red-run artifacts are not part of the authority packet. The package is honest about this, but the provenance gap remains.
findings.suggested_action: Keep the missing fail-first history recorded as low bounded debt and do not reopen the round for this item alone.
